item.description:
# CueNow 1.0.1
- Adds in-app update support powered by Sparkle. - Shows GitHub release notes in Settings > App Updates. - Adds pre-update note backups before install/relaunch. - Adds Note History recovery for unreadable saved notes, including latest-backup restore. - Blocks autosave when saved notes fail to load so existing local data is not overwritten. - Hardens support API CORS and rate-limit configuration.
